Lux

Fight alonside your companion

Download for Windows Download for Mac Credit List
Unity3D Platform Game Game Design Windows Mac

Lux is a 2D platformer in which the player must venture out from the safety of the underground city of Lux and into the danger of darkness in search of an inexhaustible source of light. With light in your city running out, you must hurry to solve puzzles, traverse multiple levels, and face numerous creatures of darkness in order to obtain the star shard.

This game works best with XBOX360 Controller. For Mac users, please download the driver from here [360Controller].

Key Mappings:

Arrow Keys: Movement | Space: Jump | D: Dash | A: Normal attack | W: AOE attack | E: Action | M: Mini map | 0: Restart | 1 - 4: Jump Level | ESC: Title
